'''Unilliten Industries''' was a large corporation that operated a large research facility on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Outpost]] in the [[Bissillirus system/Legends|Bissillirus system]]. The purpose of the research facility, and the speciality of Unilliten Industries was kept a secret by the company.

{{Company-stub}}
